Echelon Form:
( 3 5 15 7 3 21 ) 2 × 3 ( 3 5 15 0 - 26 3 - 14 ) 2 × 3 ( 3 5 15 0 - 26 3 - 14 ) 2 × 3 x = 30 13 y = 21 13

Echelon Form:

Z = 6 x = 0 y = 3 Minimize 3 x - 10 y subject to 5 x + 2 y ≥ 10 4 x + 3 y ≤ 12 x ≥ 0 , y ≥ 0 5 x + 2 y = 10 4 x + 3 y = 12 Gauss Elimination:

Echelon Form:

Echelon Form:
